payload_text:
Parent Directory

Raspberry Shake FDSN Web Service

Index of /fdsnws/

  • dataselect/
  • station/

By using this service, you automatically accept these license terms: https://shop.raspberryshake.org/license/.

An excerpt: 'It is prohibited to redistribute RaspberryShake data obtained from https://data.raspberryshake.org/fdsnws/ via your own FDSN Web Service, data center or server.'

For publication purposes, please use DOI:10.7914/SN/AM.

FDSN is not a real-time streaming protocol. It will serve data T minus 30 minutes and older. For real-time streaming services, please contact sales@rasperryshake.org. For additional details, please consult our license.

To ensure the best service performance and user experience, each request allows to download up to 24h of data. For multi-day requests, consider splitting them accordingly. For more information, visit our dedicated manual page.
